messages.content: Neptune is to Nepbar as Odyssey is to
Then do more Windows codenames in the style of Progressbar codenames. Chicago is Chitown, Neptune is Nepbar, Whistler is Whisper and Longhorn is Largehorn
Milan is Milbar, Vienna is Vienbar, Redstone is Redbar, Threshold is Threshbar
Now do the full list in the style of Progressbar systems.

Sure, here is the full list of Windows codenames in the style of Progressbar systems:

Chicago - Chitown
Neptune - Nepbar
Whistler - Whisper
Longhorn - Largehorn
Midori - Midobar
Milan - Milbar
Vienna - Wienbar
Redstone - Redbar
Threshold - Threshbar
Add Progressbar at the start of each one

Sure, here is the updated list with "Progressbar" added at the start of each codename:

Progressbar Chicago - Chitown
Progressbar Neptune - Nepbar
Progressbar Whistler - Whisper
Progressbar Longhorn - Largehorn
Progressbar Midori - Midobar
Progressbar Milan - Milbar
Progressbar Vienna - Wienbar
Progressbar Redstone - Redbar
Progressbar Threshold - Threshbar
I meant to after the dash

My apologies for misunderstanding. Here is the correct list with "Progressbar" added after the dash:

Chicago - Progressbar Chitown
Neptune - Progressbar Nepbar
Whistler - Progressbar Whisper
Longhorn - Progressbar Largehorn
Midori - Progressbar Midobar
Milan - Progressbar Milbar
Vienna - Progressbar Wienbar
Redstone - Progressbar Redbar
Threshold - Progressbar Threshbar

Chicago - Progressbar Chitown
Neptune - Progressbar Nepbar
Whistler - Progressbar Whisper
Longhorn - Progressbar Largehorn
Midori - Progressbar Midobar
Milan - Progressbar Milbar
Vienna - Progressbar Wienna
Redstone - Progressbar Redbar
Threshold - Progressbar Threshbar
Remake some of the names (excluding the first 4)

Midori - Progressbar Midobar
Milan - Progressbar Milanbar
Vienna - Progressbar Vienbar
Redstone - Progressbar Stonebar
Threshold - Progressbar Threshholdbar
